methods.method_name: Expression Analysis of RPG1 in Mutant
methods.description: This method describes the process of analyzing the expression levels of RPG1 in mutant and wild-type plants using RNA extraction and semiquantitative RT-PCR.

steps.description: RNA was extracted from inflorescences of mutant and wild-type plants using TRizol (Invitrogen).
steps.searchable_summary: extract RNA from plant inflorescences using TRizol

steps.description: Semiquantitative RT-PCR for 30 cycles was used to assess the levels of expression of rpg1 and alleles, using primer sets.
steps.searchable_summary: perform semiquantitative RT-PCR to assess RPG1 expression levels

steps.description: RPG1N-F and RPG1N-R were used to examine 5# region expression (exons 1-3), and LP and RP were used for 3# region expression analysis (exons 3-5).
steps.searchable_summary: analyze expression in specific exons using different primer sets

methods.description: This method involves performing RT-PCR on RNA extracted from various plant tissues and conducting in situ hybridization using digoxigenin-labeled probes.

steps.description: RNA was extracted from root, rosette leaves, 14-d-old seedlings, and inflorescences.
steps.searchable_summary: extract RNA from various plant tissues

steps.description: PCR was performed by LP/RP primer set.
steps.searchable_summary: perform PCR using LP/RP primer set

steps.description: In situ hybridization was performed with the DIG RNA Labeling Kit and the DIG Probe Synthesis Kit.
steps.searchable_summary: perform in situ hybridization using DIG labeling kits

steps.description: An RPG1-specific cDNA fragment of 458 bp was amplified and cloned into the pSK vector.
steps.searchable_summary: amplify and clone RPG1-specific cDNA fragment into pSK vector

steps.description: Antisense and sense digoxigenin-labeled probes were prepared with EcoRI or BamHI digestion and in vitro transcription using T3 or T7 RNA polymerase.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare digoxigenin-labeled probes using EcoRI/BamHI digestion and T3/T7 RNA polymerase
